title: Hajj Word Search
description: Find 15 words from the journey of Hajj — the Kaaba, Tawaf, Arafat and more. A fun puzzle for ages 6–12.

words.clue: The black cube Muslims face in prayer
Holy city where the Kaaba is
Two white cloths worn by pilgrims
Walking around the Kaaba seven times
One of the two small hills near the Kaaba
The other hill, walked with Safa
The plain where pilgrims stand and pray
Open plain where pilgrims sleep under the sky
Pillars where pilgrims throw small stones
Blessed spring of water near the Kaaba
The prophet linked with building the Kaaba
Ibrahim's son who helped to build Kaaba
